title: tecoma chrysotricha var. obtusata
intro: Tecoma chrysotricha var. obtusata, also known as the Yellow Bells or Esperanza, is a flowering plant species in the trumpet creeper family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tecoma chrysotricha var. obtusata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
